subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the prison-precinct, and answereth that wherewith thou didst call upon Him. Verily thy Lord is the All-Just [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن و یجیبک فیما دعوته ان ربک لهو العادل
subcodes.subjects: @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
